   COACH CRYPTOTRADE PLATFORM - MAIN STYLES
   Based on MY-SITE design (Elite Wealth Capital)
   Color Scheme: Dark Navy + Blue + Purple + Gold
   ============================================ */

/* CSS Variables - Color Scheme */
:root {
    /* Glass Morphism */
    --glass-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
    --glass-bg-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
    --glass-bg-medium: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
    --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    --glass-border-light: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
    
    /* Text Colors */
    --text-white: #ffffff;
    --text-light: #f1f5f9;
    --text-muted: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
    --text-subtle: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
    
    /* Accent Colors */
    --accent-blue: #3B82F6;
    --accent-cyan: #06b6d4;
    --accent-purple: #8B5CF6;
    --accent-green: #00A86B;
    --accent-gold: #FFD700;
    --accent-red: #ef4444;
    
    /* Gradients */
    --gradient-accent: linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6 0%, #8B5CF6 100%);
    --gradient-gold: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700 0%, #DAA520 100%);
    --gradient-glass: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05) 100%);
    
    /* Shadows */
    --shadow-glass: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    --shadow-glow-blue: 0 0 30px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
    --shadow-glow-purple: 0 0 30px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
    --shadow-glow-gold: 0 0 30px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3);
}

/* Global Styles */
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0A1F44 0%, #1e293b 50%, #0A1F44 100%);
    background-attachment: fixed;
    color: var(--text-white);
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* Navigation */
.glass-nav {
    background: rgba(10, 31, 68, 0.95);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    padding: 1rem 0;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.navbar-brand {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-white) !important;
}

.brand-text {
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.accent-text {
    color: var(--accent-gold);
}

.nav-link {
    color: var(--text-muted) !important;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem !important;
}

.nav-link:hover {
    color: var(--text-white) !important;
}

/* Video Hero Section */
.video-hero {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0A1F44 0%, #1e293b 100%);
}

.hero-video {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    min-width: 100%;
    min-height: 100%;
    width: auto;
    height: auto;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    z-index: 0;
    opacity: 0.3;
}

.hero-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(
        135deg,
        rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85) 0%,
        rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.75) 50%,
        rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.85) 100%
    );
    z-index: 1;
}

.hero-content {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem;
    max-width: 1200px;
}

.hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.hero-subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.5rem);
    color: var(--text-light);
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    max-width: 800px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.hero-buttons {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.hero-btn {
    padding: 1rem 2.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    border-radius: 50px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    border: none;
}

.hero-btn-primary {
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    color: var(--text-white);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-blue);
}

.hero-btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5);
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.hero-btn-secondary {
    background: var(--glass-bg-medium);
    color: var(--text-white);
    border: 2px solid var(--glass-border-light);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero-btn-secondary:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    color: var(--text-white);
}

/* Stats Section */
.stats-section {
    padding: 4rem 0;
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.stat-card {
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.stat-card:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
}

.stat-icon {
    font-size: 3rem;
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.stat-number {
    font-size: 2.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.stat-label {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 1rem;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Features Section */
.features-section {
    padding: 6rem 0;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%);
}

.section-title {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.section-subtitle {
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
}

.feature-card {
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    height: 100%;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.feature-card:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    transform: translateY(-10px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
}

.feature-icon {
    width: 70px;
    height: 70px;
    border-radius: 15px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.feature-icon.blue { background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3); }
.feature-icon.purple { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); }
.feature-icon.gold { background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3); }
.feature-icon.green { background: rgba(0, 168, 107, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 168, 107, 0.3); }
.feature-icon.cyan { background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.3); }
.feature-icon.red { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3); }

.feature-card h3 {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.feature-card p {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.7;
}

/* Reviews/Testimonials Section */
.reviews-section {
    padding: 6rem 0;
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.5);
}

.reviews-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(350px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
    margin-top: 3rem;
}

.review-card {
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 2rem;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.review-card:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    transform: translateY(-10px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
    border-color: var(--accent-purple);
}

.review-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.review-avatar {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 3px solid var(--accent-blue);
}

.review-avatar img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
}

.review-info {
    flex: 1;
}

.review-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    color: var(--text-white);
    margin: 0;
}

.review-company {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin: 0;
}

.review-location {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
    margin: 0;
}

.review-rating {
    color: var(--accent-gold);
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
}

.review-text {
    color: var(--text-light);
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-style: italic;
    margin: 0;
}

/* CTA Section */
.cta-section {
    padding: 6rem 0;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
}

.cta-content {
    text-align: center;
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 4rem 2rem;
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 30px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.cta-content h2 {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    background: var(--gradient-gold);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.cta-content p {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    background: rgba(10, 22, 40, 0.98);
    padding: 4rem 0 2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
}

.footer h5 {
    color: var(--text-white);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.footer h6 {
    color: var(--text-white);
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.footer p {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.7;
}

.footer ul li {
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.footer ul li a {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
}

.footer ul li a:hover {
    color: var(--accent-blue);
}

.social-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
}

.social-links a {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    color: var(--text-white);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.social-links a:hover {
    background: var(--accent-blue);
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .hero-content {
        padding: 1rem;
    }
    
    .hero-title {
        font-size: 2rem;
    }
    
    .hero-subtitle {
        font-size: 1rem;
    }
    
    .hero-buttons {
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 1rem;
    }
    
    .hero-btn {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }
    
    .reviews-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    
    .stat-card {
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
    }
}

/* Smooth Scrolling */
html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
}

/* Loading Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.fade-in {
    animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease-out;
}

/* ============================================
   CRYPTO TICKER (Header)
   ============================================ */
.crypto-ticker-horizontal {
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.98);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    padding: 8px 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    z-index: 1002;
    height: 40px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}

.ticker-track {
    display: flex;
    animation: ticker 30s linear infinite;
    gap: 3rem;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

@keyframes ticker {
    0% {
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
    100% {
        transform: translateX(-50%);
    }
}

.ticker-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-light);
}

.crypto-symbol {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
    min-width: 50px;
}

.crypto-price {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.crypto-change {
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
}

.crypto-change.positive {
    color: var(--accent-green);
}

.crypto-change.negative {
    color: var(--accent-red);
}

.crypto-change.neutral {
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* Adjust navbar position for ticker */
.glass-nav {
    top: 40px !important;
}

/* ============================================
   MODERN HERO SECTION
   ============================================ */
.hero-section-modern {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
    padding-top: 40px;
    padding-bottom: 60px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at 70% 30%, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15), transparent 60%),
                linear-gradient(135deg, #0A1F44 0%, #0F172A 100%);
}

.hero-background-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: transparent;
    z-index: 1;
}

.hero-particles {
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    z-index: 2;
}
}

.particle {
    position: absolute;
    width: 4px;
    height: 4px;
    background: var(--accent-blue);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: float 20s infinite ease-in-out;
}

.particle:nth-child(1) {
    top: 20%;
    left: 20%;
    animation-delay: 0s;
    background: var(--accent-blue);
}

.particle:nth-child(2) {
    top: 60%;
    left: 80%;
    animation-delay: 2s;
    background: var(--accent-purple);
}

.particle:nth-child(3) {
    top: 40%;
    left: 60%;
    animation-delay: 4s;
    background: var(--accent-gold);
}

.particle:nth-child(4) {
    top: 80%;
    left: 30%;
    animation-delay: 6s;
    background: var(--accent-cyan);
}

.particle:nth-child(5) {
    top: 30%;
    left: 90%;
    animation-delay: 8s;
    background: var(--accent-green);
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0) translateX(0);
        opacity: 0.3;
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-30px) translateX(30px);
        opacity: 0.7;
    }
}

.hero-content-modern {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 3;
}

.hero-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    background: var(--glass-bg-medium);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.hero-title-modern {
    font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 6vw, 4.5rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.gradient-text {
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.hero-subtitle-modern {
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.25rem);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    max-width: 600px;
}

.hero-buttons-modern {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.btn-modern {
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    border-radius: 12px;
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    border: none;
}

.btn-primary-modern {
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    color: var(--text-white);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-blue);
}

.btn-primary-modern:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.5);
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.btn-secondary-modern {
    background: var(--glass-bg-medium);
    color: var(--text-white);
    border: 2px solid var(--glass-border-light);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.btn-secondary-modern:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    border-color: var(--accent-blue);
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.trust-indicators {
    display: flex;
    gap: 2rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.trust-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.trust-item i {
    color: var(--accent-green);
    font-size: 1.2rem;
}

/* Hero Visual - Trading Card */
.hero-visual {
    position: relative;
}

.trading-card {
    background: var(--glass-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2rem;
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
    animation: float-card 6s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float-card {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-20px);
    }
}

.trading-card-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
}

.trading-card-header h4 {
    color: var(--text-white);
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
}

.status-indicator {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    color: var(--accent-green);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.pulse {
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: var(--accent-green);
    border-radius: 50%;
    animation: pulse-animation 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse-animation {
    0%, 100% {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
    50% {
        opacity: 0.5;
        transform: scale(1.2);
    }
}

.crypto-list {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.crypto-item {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: var(--glass-bg-light);
    border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.crypto-item:hover {
    background: var(--glass-bg-medium);
    transform: translateX(5px);
}

.crypto-info {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.crypto-icon {
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.crypto-name {
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-white);
    font-size: 1rem;
}

.crypto-code {
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--text-muted);
}

.crypto-stats {
    text-align: right;
}

.crypto-price-large {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-white);
}

.crypto-change-large {
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    justify-content: flex-end;
}

.crypto-change-large.positive {
    color: var(--accent-green);
}

.crypto-change-large.negative {
    color: var(--accent-red);
}

.trading-card-footer {
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
    padding-top: 1.5rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
}

.btn-trade-now {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 1rem;
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    color: var(--text-white);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.btn-trade-now:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow-blue);
}

/* Mobile Responsive */
@media (max-width: 992px) {
    .hero-section-modern {
        padding-top: 100px;
    }
    
    .hero-title-modern {
        font-size: 2.5rem;
    }
    
    .trading-card {
        margin-top: 3rem;
    }
    
    .trust-indicators {
        gap: 1rem;
    }
    
    .hero-buttons-modern {
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    
    .btn-modern {
        width: 100%;
        justify-content: center;
    }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .crypto-ticker-horizontal {
        font-size: 0.75rem;
    }
    
    .ticker-track {
        gap: 2rem;
    }
    
    .crypto-symbol {
        min-width: 40px;
    }
}

/* About CoachJVTech Section */
.about-section {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0b0e11 0%, #1e2329 100%);
    padding: 100px 0;
}

.about-image-wrapper {
    position: relative;
}

.about-image-frame {
    position: relative;
    border-radius: 20px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.3);
    border: 3px solid rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.5);
}

.about-badge {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0b90b, #fcd535);
    padding: 15px 20px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
    color: #000;
}

.about-badge i {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.about-badge strong {
    font-size: 16px;
    display: block;
}

.about-badge span {
    font-size: 12px;
    opacity: 0.8;
}

.about-content {
    padding-left: 40px;
}

.section-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 8px 16px;
    background: rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.3);
    border-radius: 20px;
    color: #f0b90b;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.about-highlights {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
}

.highlight-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(30, 35, 41, 0.6);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.1);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.highlight-item:hover {
    border-color: rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.4);
    transform: translateX(10px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.2);
}

.highlight-item i {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #f0b90b;
    margin-top: 4px;
}

.highlight-item strong {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #eaecef;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.highlight-item p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #848e9c;
    margin: 0;
}

.social-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.social-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 12px 24px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    border: 2px solid;
}

.social-btn.tiktok {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #000000, #00f2ea);
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #00f2ea;
}

.social-btn.tiktok:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 242, 234, 0.4);
}

.social-btn.youtube {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF0000, #cc0000);
    color: #fff;
    border-color: #FF0000;
}

.social-btn.youtube:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.4);
}

.social-btn.snapchat {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFC00, #FFFC00);
    color: #000;
    border-color: #FFFC00;
}

.social-btn.snapchat:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(255, 252, 0, 0.4);
}

@media (max-width: 991px) {
    .about-content {
        padding-left: 0;
        margin-top: 40px;
    }
}

/* Modern Hero Visual (Geometric) */
.hero-visual-modern {
    position: relative;
    height: 400px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

.hero-shape-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 300px;
    height: 300px;
}

.shape {
    position: absolute;
    border-radius: 30px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    filter: blur(20px);
}

.shape-1 { top: 0; left: 0; width: 150px; height: 150px; background: var(--accent-blue); animation: move 10s infinite alternate; }
.shape-2 { bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 180px; height: 180px; background: var(--accent-purple); animation: move 15s infinite alternate-reverse; }
.shape-3 { top: 50%; left: 50%; width: 120px; height: 120px; background: var(--accent-gold); animation: pulse 5s infinite; }

@keyframes move { from { transform: translate(0, 0); } to { transform: translate(50px, 50px); } }
@keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); } }

.hero-coach-img {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0px;
    right: 0px;
    width: 250px;
    height: 300px;
    object-fit: cover;
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid var(--accent-gold);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    z-index: 2;
}

.hero-card-display {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
    padding: 2rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 350px;
    margin-top: 50px;
}

.card-badge { color: var(--accent-gold); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.card-title { font-size: 1.2rem; color: #fff; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.profit-value { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--accent-green); margin-bottom: 1rem; }

.card-chart-placeholder {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 5px;
    height: 50px;
}

.bar {
    flex: 1;
    background: var(--gradient-accent);
    border-radius: 2px;
}
.feature-card-link {
    text-decoration: none;
    color: inherit;
    display: block;
}

.feature-card-clickable {
    cursor: pointer;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.feature-card-clickable::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: -100%;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.1), transparent);
    transition: left 0.5s ease;
}

.feature-card-clickable:hover::before {
    left: 100%;
}

.feature-card-clickable:hover {
    transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);
    border-color: var(--accent-color);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.3);
}

.feature-cta {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.2);
    color: var(--accent-color);
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.feature-card-clickable:hover .feature-cta {
    color: #fcd535;
    transform: translateX(5px);
}

.feature-cta i {
    font-size: 16px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.feature-card-clickable:hover .feature-cta i {
    transform: translateX(5px);
}

/* Enhanced Navigation Links */
.nav-link i {
    opacity: 0.8;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
}

.nav-link:hover i {
    opacity: 1;
}

/* Quick Access Platform Links */
.quick-access-section {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0b0e11 0%, #1e2329 100%);
    padding: 80px 0;
}

.quick-access-card {
    background: rgba(30, 35, 41, 0.8);
    backdrop-filter: blur(15px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(15px);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 40px 30px;
    text-align: center;
    border: 2px solid;
    transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    height: 100%;
}

.quick-access-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50%;
    left: -50%;
    width: 200%;
    height: 200%;
    background: conic-gradient(
        from 0deg,
        transparent,
        currentColor,
        transparent
    );
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
    animation: rotateQuickAccess 4s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes rotateQuickAccess {
    from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
    to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
}

.quick-access-card:hover::before {
    opacity: 0.1;
}

.quick-access-card.trading {
    border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4);
    color: #8b5cf6;
}

.quick-access-card.trading:hover {
    border-color: #8b5cf6;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.4);
    transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);
}

.quick-access-card.p2p {
    border-color: rgba(14, 203, 129, 0.4);
    color: #0ecb81;
}

.quick-access-card.p2p:hover {
    border-color: #0ecb81;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(14, 203, 129, 0.4);
    transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);
}

.quick-access-card.mining {
    border-color: rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.4);
    color: #f0b90b;
}

.quick-access-card.mining:hover {
    border-color: #f0b90b;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(240, 185, 11, 0.4);
    transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02);
}

.quick-access-icon {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
    margin: 0 auto 25px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 48px;
    background: rgba(30, 35, 41, 0.6);
    border: 3px solid currentColor;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
}

.quick-access-card:hover .quick-access-icon {
    transform: scale(1.1) rotate(360deg);
    box-shadow: 0 0 40px currentColor;
}

.quick-access-card h3 {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    color: #eaecef;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.quick-access-card p {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: #848e9c;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.quick-access-btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 32px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, currentColor, currentColor);
    color: #000;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.quick-access-btn::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    left: 50%;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
    border-radius: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    transition: width 0.6s, height 0.6s;
}

.quick-access-btn:hover::before {
    width: 400px;
    height: 400px;
}

.quick-access-btn:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.05);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px currentColor;
}

.quick-access-btn span,
.quick-access-btn i {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.quick-access-card.trading .quick-access-btn {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #a78bfa);
}

.quick-access-card.p2p .quick-access-btn {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0ecb81, #2ecc71);
}

.quick-access-card.mining .quick-access-btn {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0b90b, #fcd535);
}

// Live crypto prices, charts, and animations

// Crypto API Configuration
const COINGECKO_API = 'https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3';

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    initializeDashboard();
    initializeCryptoTicker();
    initializeXRPChart();
    loadPortfolio();
    loadCryptoTable();
    loadDynamicUpdates(); // New function
    
    // Update prices every 30 seconds
    setInterval(updateAllPrices, 30000);
});

// Load Dynamic Updates
async function loadDynamicUpdates() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch('/static/data/dashboard-updates.json');
        const data = await response.json();
        const updatesContainer = document.getElementById('updatesContainer');
        
        if (updatesContainer && data.updates) {
            updatesContainer.innerHTML = data.updates.map(update => `
                <div class="update-card">
                    <h5>${update.title}</h5>
                    <p>${update.description}</p>
                    <a href="${update.link}" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Read More</a>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading updates:', error);
    }
}

// Initialize Dashboard
async function initializeDashboard() {
    await updateAllPrices();
    animateStats();
}

// Update All Crypto Prices
async function updateAllPrices() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/simple/price?ids=ripple,bitcoin,ethereum,solana,cardano,dogecoin,binancecoin,tether,polkadot,chainlink&vs_currencies=usd&include_24hr_change=true&include_market_cap=true`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        // Update XRP Price
        if (data.ripple) {
            const xrpPrice = document.getElementById('xrpPrice');
            const xrpChange = document.getElementById('xrpChange');
            
            if (xrpPrice) {
                xrpPrice.textContent = `$${data.ripple.usd.toFixed(4)}`;
            }
            
            if (xrpChange) {
                const change = data.ripple.usd_24h_change;
                xrpChange.textContent = `${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(2)}%`;
                xrpChange.className = `price-change ${change >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}`;
            }
            
            // Update XRP Holdings
            const xrpHoldings = document.getElementById('xrpHoldings');
            if (xrpHoldings) {
                const holdings = 5000; // Example holdings
                const value = holdings * data.ripple.usd;
                xrpHoldings.textContent = `${holdings.toLocaleString()} XRP ($${value.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: 2})})`;
            }
        }
        
        // Update Total Portfolio
        if (data.bitcoin && data.ethereum && data.ripple) {
            const totalPortfolio = document.getElementById('totalPortfolio');
            if (totalPortfolio) {
                // Example portfolio calculation
                const btcValue = 0.5 * data.bitcoin.usd;
                const ethValue = 2 * data.ethereum.usd;
                const xrpValue = 5000 * data.ripple.usd;
                const total = btcValue + ethValue + xrpValue;
                
                totalPortfolio.textContent = `$${total.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: 2})}`;
            }
        }
        
        return data;
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching prices:', error);
    }
}

// Crypto Ticker
function initializeCryptoTicker() {
    const tickerTrack = document.getElementById('tickerTrack');
    if (!tickerTrack) return;
    
    const cryptos = [
        { symbol: 'BTC', name: 'Bitcoin', id: 'bitcoin' },
        { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum', id: 'ethereum' },
        { symbol: 'XRP', name: 'XRP', id: 'ripple' },
        { symbol: 'SOL', name: 'Solana', id: 'solana' },
        { symbol: 'ADA', name: 'Cardano', id: 'cardano' },
        { symbol: 'DOGE', name: 'Dogecoin', id: 'dogecoin' },
        { symbol: 'BNB', name: 'Binance', id: 'binancecoin' },
        { symbol: 'DOT', name: 'Polkadot', id: 'polkadot' }
    ];
    
    // Create ticker items (duplicate for seamless loop)
    const tickerHTML = cryptos.concat(cryptos).map(crypto => `
        <div class="ticker-item" data-crypto="${crypto.id}">
            <span class="crypto-symbol">${crypto.symbol}</span>
            <span class="crypto-price">$0.00</span>
            <span class="crypto-change neutral">0.00%</span>
        </div>
    `).join('');
    
    tickerTrack.innerHTML = tickerHTML;
    
    // Update ticker prices
    updateTickerPrices();
}

async function updateTickerPrices() {
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/simple/price?ids=bitcoin,ethereum,ripple,solana,cardano,dogecoin,binancecoin,polkadot&vs_currencies=usd&include_24hr_change=true`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.ticker-item').forEach(item => {
            const cryptoId = item.getAttribute('data-crypto');
            if (data[cryptoId]) {
                const price = data[cryptoId].usd;
                const change = data[cryptoId].usd_24h_change;
                
                const priceElement = item.querySelector('.crypto-price');
                const changeElement = item.querySelector('.crypto-change');
                
                if (priceElement) {
                    priceElement.textContent = `$${price.toLocaleString('en-US', {
                        minimumFractionDigits: 2,
                        maximumFractionDigits: price < 1 ? 4 : 2
                    })}`;
                }
                
                if (changeElement && change !== undefined) {
                    changeElement.textContent = `${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(2)}%`;
                    changeElement.className = `crypto-change ${change >= 0 ? 'positive' : change < 0 ? 'negative' : 'neutral'}`;
                }
            }
        });
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error updating ticker:', error);
    }
}

// XRP Chart with Chart.js
let xrpChart = null;

async function initializeXRPChart() {
    const ctx = document.getElementById('xrpChart');
    if (!ctx) return;
    
    try {
        // Fetch 7 days of historical data
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/coins/ripple/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=7`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        const prices = data.prices.map(p => ({
            x: new Date(p[0]),
            y: p[1]
        }));
        
        xrpChart = new Chart(ctx, {
            type: 'line',
            data: {
                datasets: [{
                    label: 'XRP Price (USD)',
                    data: prices,
                    borderColor: '#06B6D4',
                    backgroundColor: 'rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1)',
                    borderWidth: 3,
                    fill: true,
                    tension: 0.4,
                    pointRadius: 0,
                    pointHoverRadius: 6,
                    pointBackgroundColor: '#06B6D4',
                    pointBorderColor: '#fff',
                    pointBorderWidth: 2
                }]
            },
            options: {
                responsive: true,
                maintainAspectRatio: false,
                interaction: {
                    intersect: false,
                    mode: 'index'
                },
                plugins: {
                    legend: {
                        display: false
                    },
                    tooltip: {
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95)',
                        titleColor: '#fff',
                        bodyColor: '#94a3b8',
                        borderColor: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)',
                        borderWidth: 1,
                        padding: 12,
                        displayColors: false,
                        callbacks: {
                            label: function(context) {
                                return `$${context.parsed.y.toFixed(4)}`;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                },
                scales: {
                    x: {
                        type: 'time',
                        time: {
                            unit: 'day'
                        },
                        grid: {
                            color: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)',
                            drawBorder: false
                        },
                        ticks: {
                            color: '#64748b'
                        }
                    },
                    y: {
                        grid: {
                            color: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)',
                            drawBorder: false
                        },
                        ticks: {
                            color: '#64748b',
                            callback: function(value) {
                                return '$' + value.toFixed(2);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        });
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading chart:', error);
    }
}

// Load Portfolio
async function loadPortfolio() {
    const portfolioList = document.getElementById('portfolioList');
    if (!portfolioList) return;
    
    const portfolio = [
        { symbol: 'XRP', name: 'Ripple', amount: 5000, id: 'ripple' },
        { symbol: 'BTC', name: 'Bitcoin', amount: 0.5, id: 'bitcoin' },
        { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum', amount: 2, id: 'ethereum' },
        { symbol: 'SOL', name: 'Solana', amount: 25, id: 'solana' }
    ];
    
    try {
        const ids = portfolio.map(p => p.id).join(',');
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/simple/price?ids=${ids}&vs_currencies=usd&include_24hr_change=true`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        const html = portfolio.map(asset => {
            const priceData = data[asset.id];
            const value = asset.amount * priceData.usd;
            const change = priceData.usd_24h_change;
            
            return `
                <div class="portfolio-item">
                    <div class="portfolio-info">
                        <div class="portfolio-icon">${asset.symbol}</div>
                        <div>
                            <div class="portfolio-name">${asset.name}</div>
                            <div class="portfolio-amount">${asset.amount.toLocaleString()} ${asset.symbol}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="portfolio-value">
                        <div class="portfolio-price">$${value.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: 2})}</div>
                        <div class="portfolio-change ${change >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}">
                            ${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(2)}%
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }).join('');
        
        portfolioList.innerHTML = html;
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading portfolio:', error);
    }
}

// Load Crypto Table
async function loadCryptoTable() {
    const cryptoTable = document.getElementById('cryptoTable');
    if (!cryptoTable) return;
    
    const cryptos = [
        { symbol: 'BTC', name: 'Bitcoin', id: 'bitcoin', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/bitcoin-btc-logo.png' },
        { symbol: 'ETH', name: 'Ethereum', id: 'ethereum', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/ethereum-eth-logo.png' },
        { symbol: 'XRP', name: 'Ripple', id: 'ripple', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/xrp-xrp-logo.png' },
        { symbol: 'SOL', name: 'Solana', id: 'solana', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/solana-sol-logo.png' },
        { symbol: 'ADA', name: 'Cardano', id: 'cardano', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/cardano-ada-logo.png' },
        { symbol: 'DOT', name: 'Polkadot', id: 'polkadot', logo: 'https://cryptologos.cc/logos/polkadot-new-dot-logo.png' }
    ];
    
    try {
        const ids = cryptos.map(c => c.id).join(',');
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/simple/price?ids=${ids}&vs_currencies=usd&include_24hr_change=true&include_market_cap=true`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        const html = cryptos.map(crypto => {
            const priceData = data[crypto.id];
            const change = priceData.usd_24h_change;
            
            return `
                <div class="crypto-row">
                    <div class="crypto-row-name">
                        <img src="${crypto.logo}" alt="${crypto.symbol}" class="crypto-row-icon" onerror="this.style.display='none'">
                        <div>
                            <div class="crypto-row-symbol">${crypto.symbol}</div>
                            <div class="crypto-row-name-full">${crypto.name}</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="crypto-row-price">
                        $${priceData.usd.toLocaleString('en-US', {maximumFractionDigits: priceData.usd < 1 ? 4 : 2})}
                    </div>
                    <div class="crypto-row-change ${change >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}">
                        ${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(2)}%
                    </div>
                    <div>
                        <i class="fas fa-chevron-right" style="color: var(--text-muted);"></i>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        }).join('');
        
        cryptoTable.innerHTML = html;
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading crypto table:', error);
    }
}

// Animate Stats on Load
function animateStats() {
    const stats = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-card');
    stats.forEach((stat, index) => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            stat.style.opacity = '0';
            stat.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
            stat.style.transition = 'all 0.5s ease';
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                stat.style.opacity = '1';
                stat.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }, 50);
        }, index * 100);
    });
}

// Chart Time Period Buttons
document.querySelectorAll('.btn-chart').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-chart').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        this.classList.add('active');
        
        const period = this.textContent;
        updateChartPeriod(period);
    });
});

async function updateChartPeriod(period) {
    const days = {
        '1D': 1,
        '1W': 7,
        '1M': 30,
        '1Y': 365
    }[period] || 7;
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${COINGECKO_API}/coins/ripple/market_chart?vs_currency=usd&days=${days}`);
        const data = await response.json();
        
        const prices = data.prices.map(p => ({
            x: new Date(p[0]),
            y: p[1]
        }));
        
        if (xrpChart) {
            xrpChart.data.datasets[0].data = prices;
            xrpChart.update();
        }
        
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error updating chart:', error);
    }
}

// Sidebar Navigation Active State
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        if (!this.href || this.href.includes('#')) {
            e.preventDefault();
        }
        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('active'));
        this.classList.add('active');
    });
});

// Mobile Menu Toggle (if needed)
function toggleSidebar() {
    const sidebar = document.querySelector('.dashboard-sidebar');
    sidebar.style.transform = sidebar.style.transform === 'translateX(0px)' ? 'translateX(-100%)' : 'translateX(0px)';
}

// Notification Badge Animation
function animateNotificationBadge() {
    const badge = document.querySelector('.notification-badge');
    if (badge) {
        setInterval(() => {
            badge.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                badge.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
            }, 200);
        }, 3000);
    }
}

animateNotificationBadge();

// Update prices immediately on load
updateTickerPrices();

from django.urls import path
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static
from core import views

urlpatterns = [
    path('admin/', admin.site.urls),
    path('', views.home, name='home'),
    
    # Authentication
    path('login/', views.login_view, name='login'),
    path('register/', views.register_view, name='register'),
    path('logout/', views.logout_view, name='logout'),
    path('password-reset/', views.password_reset_view, name='password_reset'),
    
    # Dashboard
    path('dashboard/', views.dashboard, name='dashboard'),
    path('dashboard/wallet/', views.wallet_view, name='wallet'),
    path('dashboard/trading/', views.trading_view, name='trading'),
    path('dashboard/mining/', views.mining_view, name='mining'),
    path('dashboard/p2p/', views.p2p_view, name='p2p'),
    path('dashboard/profile/', views.profile_view, name='profile'),
    
    # API
    path('api/prices/', views.api_prices, name='api_prices'),
    
    # Newsletter
    path('newsletter/subscribe/', views.newsletter_subscribe, name='newsletter_subscribe'),
]

# Serve media files in development
if settings.DEBUG:

    }
</script>

{% load static %}

{% block title %}Login - CoachJVTech Platform{% endblock %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .auth-wrapper {
        min-height: 100vh;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 100px 20px;
        position: relative;
    }

    .auth-card {
        background: var(--glass-bg);
        backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
        border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
        border-radius: 24px;
        padding: 50px 40px;
        max-width: 450px;
        width: 100%;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
    }

    .auth-logo {
        text-align: center;
        margin-bottom: 35px;
    }

    .auth-logo h1 {
        font-size: 2.5rem;
        font-weight: 800;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .form-group {
        margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    }

    .form-label {
        color: var(--text-muted);
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        font-weight: 500;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        display: block;
    }

    .form-control {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
        border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 12px 15px;
        color: var(--text-white);
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .form-control:focus {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        border-color: var(--accent-blue);
        box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
        color: var(--text-white);
    }

    .auth-btn {
        width: 100%;
        padding: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .auth-links {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: 2rem;
        color: var(--text-muted);
        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .auth-links a {
        color: var(--accent-blue);
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 600;
    }

    .auth-links a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<!-- Use Hero Overlay Style for consistency -->
<div class="hero-overlay" style="position: fixed; opacity: 0.5;"></div>

<div class="auth-wrapper">
    <div class="auth-card" data-aos="zoom-in">
        <div class="auth-logo">
            <h1 class="brand-text">Coach<span class="accent-text"> JV</span></h1>
            <p class="text-muted">3T Warrior Academy</p>
        </div>

        <div id="alert-container">
            {% if messages %}
                {% for message in messages %}
                    <div class="alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                        {{ message }}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                    </div>
                {% endfor %}
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            {% csrf_token %}
            <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Username</label>
                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="username" id="username" placeholder="Enter your username" required>
            </div>
            
            <div class="form-group">
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                    <label class="form-label">Password</label>
                    <a href="/password-reset" class="small" style="color: var(--accent-blue); text-decoration: none;">Forgot?</a>
                </div>
                <input type="password" class="form-control" name="password" id="password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" class="hero-btn hero-btn-primary auth-btn" id="loginBtn">
                <span class="btn-text">Login to Platform</span>
                <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm d-none" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span>
            </button>
        </form>

        <div class="auth-links">
            Don't have an account? <a href="/register">Sign Up Now</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    document.getElementById('loginForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
        const btnText = loginBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = loginBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        // Show loading
        loginBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Authenticating...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/login/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });

{% block content %}
<!-- Use Hero Overlay Style for consistency -->
<div class="hero-overlay" style="position: fixed; opacity: 0.5;"></div>

<div class="auth-wrapper">
    <div class="auth-card" data-aos="zoom-in">
        <div class="auth-logo">
            <h1 class="brand-text">Coach<span class="accent-text"> JV</span></h1>
            <p class="text-muted">3T Warrior Academy</p>
        </div>

        <div id="alert-container">
            {% if messages %}
                {% for message in messages %}
                    <div class="alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                        {{ message }}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                    </div>
                {% endfor %}
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            {% csrf_token %}
            <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Username</label>
                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="username" id="username" placeholder="Enter your username" required>
            </div>
            
            <div class="form-group">
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                    <label class="form-label">Password</label>
                    <a href="/password-reset" class="small" style="color: var(--accent-blue); text-decoration: none;">Forgot?</a>
                </div>
                <input type="password" class="form-control" name="password" id="password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" class="hero-btn hero-btn-primary auth-btn" id="loginBtn">
                <span class="btn-text">Login to Platform</span>
                <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm d-none" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span>
            </button>
        </form>

        <div class="auth-links">
            Don't have an account? <a href="/register">Sign Up Now</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    document.getElementById('loginForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
        const btnText = loginBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = loginBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        // Show loading
        loginBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Authenticating...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/login/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });
            
            const result = await response.json();
            
            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error || 'Login failed. Please check your credentials.'}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                    An error occurred. Please try again later.
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                </div>
            `;
        } finally {
            loginBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Login to Platform';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    let userEmail = '';

    document.getElementById('registerForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const registerBtn = document.getElementById('registerBtn');
        const btnText = registerBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = registerBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        registerBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Creating Account...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/register/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                userEmail = result.email;
                document.getElementById('user-email').textContent = userEmail;
                document.getElementById('register-form-section').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('verification-section').style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">An error occurred. Please try again.</div>`;
        } finally {
            registerBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Create Warrior Account';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('verifyForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const verifyBtn = document.getElementById('verifyBtn');
        const btnText = verifyBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        
        verifyBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Verifying...';

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const token = formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken');
        const code = document.getElementById('verification_code').value;

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/verify-email/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': token
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail, code: code})
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
                verifyBtn.disabled = false;
                btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Verification failed.</div>`;
            verifyBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('resendBtn').addEventListener('click', async function() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/resend-verification/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': document.querySelector('[name=csrfmiddlewaretoken]').value
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail})
            });
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">Verification code resent!</div>`;
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Failed to resend code.</div>`;
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">An error occurred. Please try again.</div>`;
        } finally {
            registerBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Create Warrior Account';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('verifyForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const verifyBtn = document.getElementById('verifyBtn');
        const btnText = verifyBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        
        verifyBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Verifying...';

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const token = formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken');
        const code = document.getElementById('verification_code').value;

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/verify-email/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': token
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail, code: code})
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
                verifyBtn.disabled = false;
                btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Verification failed.</div>`;
            verifyBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('resendBtn').addEventListener('click', async function() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/resend-verification/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': document.querySelector('[name=csrfmiddlewaretoken]').value
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail})
            });
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">Verification code resent!</div>`;
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Failed to resend code.</div>`;
        }
    });
</script>

/* Dashboard Styles - Based on CoachJVTech 3T Warrior Academy Design */

:root {
    /* Color Palette from Hero Image */
    --primary-dark: #0A1F44;
    --secondary-dark: #0f172a;
    --tertiary-dark: #1e1b4b;
    --accent-blue: #3B82F6;
    --accent-purple: #4338ca;
    --accent-cyan: #06B6D4;
    --accent-gold: #FFD700;
    --accent-orange: #FFA500;
    
    /* Text Colors */
    --text-primary: #ffffff;
    --text-secondary: #94a3b8;
    --text-muted: #64748b;
    
    /* UI Elements */
    --card-bg: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95);
    --card-border: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2);
    --glass-bg: rgba(30, 27, 75, 0.8);
    --hover-bg: rgba(67, 56, 202, 0.3);
    
    /* Status Colors */
    --success-color: #10b981;
    --danger-color: #ef4444;
    --warning-color: #f59e0b;
    --info-color: #3b82f6;
    
    /* Gradients */
    --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #0A1F44 0%, #1e1b4b 50%, #4338ca 100%);
    --gradient-gold: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700 0%, #FFA500 100%);
    --gradient-blue: linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6 0%, #06B6D4 100%);
}

* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--gradient-primary);
    background-attachment: fixed;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    min-height: 100vh;
}

/* Dashboard Wrapper */
.dashboard-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding-top: 40px; /* Space for crypto ticker */
}

/* Sidebar */
.dashboard-sidebar {
    width: 280px;
    background: var(--card-bg);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--card-border);
    padding: 2rem 0;
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    top: 40px;
    bottom: 0;
    overflow-y: auto;
    z-index: 100;
}

.sidebar-header {
    padding: 0 2rem 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border);
}

.logo-section {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
}

.logo-section i {
    font-size: 2rem;
    background: var(--gradient-gold);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.sidebar-nav {
    padding: 2rem 0;
    flex: 1;
}

            left: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 12px;
            max-width: 320px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            z-index: 9997;
            display: none;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2);
            transform: translateX(-120%);
            transition: transform 0.4s ease;
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(div);
        this.popupElement = div;
    }

    showRandomTestimonial() {
        if (this.shownIndices.length >= this.testimonials.length) {
            this.shownIndices = [];
        }

        let available = this.testimonials.map((_, i) => i).filter(i => !this.shownIndices.includes(i));
        const randomIndex = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];
        const person = this.testimonials[randomIndex];
        
        this.shownIndices.push(randomIndex);
        
        console.log(`Debug: Testimonial for ${person.name}, Avatar URL: ${person.avatar}`);
        
        this.popupElement.innerHTML = `
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;">
                <img src="${person.avatar}" 
                     style="width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #FFD700; flex-shrink: 0; background: #333;"
                     onerror="console.log('Error loading avatar for ${person.name}: ${person.avatar}'); this.onerror=null; this.src='https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(person.name)}&background=FFD700&color=000&size=42'">
                <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                        <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #fff; font-size: 0.9rem;">${person.name}</span>
                        <button onclick="document.getElementById('testimonial-popup-new').style.transform='translateX(-120%)';setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('testimonial-popup-new').style.display='none',400)" 
                                style="background: transparent; border: none; color: #999; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.2rem; padding: 0; line-height: 1;">×</button>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #FFD700; margin-bottom: 6px;">${person.flag} ${person.country}</div>
                    <div style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 6px;">"${person.review}"</div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.7rem;">
                        <span style="color: #00A86B;">💰 Earned: ${person.amount}</span>
                        <span style="color: #888;">Invested: ${person.invested}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;

        this.popupElement.style.display = 'block';
        setTimeout(() => {
            this.popupElement.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        }, 100);

        setTimeout(() => {
            this.popupElement.style.transform = 'translateX(-120%)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.popupElement.style.display = 'none';
            }, 400);
        }, 12000);
    }
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    new TestimonialPopup();
});

### 1. Saved Render API Key
I found a saved Render API key in your `coach/.env` file:
*   **API Key**: `rnd_0dNZrwZtMGYMAZbTYuTprDvPuOEH`
*   **Verification**: I tested this key, and it is **active**. It is currently linked to a Render workspace named **"My Workspace"** (email: `admin@amiragold.trade`).

### 2. Moving Your Domain Between Render Accounts
Yes, I can guide you through this. Render doesn't have an automated "transfer" button, so you have to do it manually in three steps:

*   **Step A (Old Account)**: Log in to the original account, go to **Settings > Custom Domains**, and click the **X** to delete the domain. This "releases" it so it can be used elsewhere.
*   **Step B (New Account)**: Log in to the new account, go to your service's **Settings > Custom Domains**, and click **+ Add Custom Domain**.
*   **Step C (DNS Update)**: If your new service has a different `.onrender.com` address, you will need to update the **CNAME** record in your DNS provider (like Cloudflare or GoDaddy) to point to the new address.

### 3. Installing Neon DB
I have already configured your project to use Neon. To "install" it (initialize the database tables):
1.  **Deployment**: Once you push your code to Render, the `render.yaml` I updated will automatically run `python manage.py migrate`.
2.  **Connection String**: The database is located at: `ep-curly-king-apo21r98-pooler.c-7.us-east-1.aws.neon.tech`.
3.  **Local Setup**: If you want to run it locally, you just need to install the requirements (`pip install -r requirements.txt`) and your `.env` is already pointing to the Neon DB.

**Note**: I noticed the virtual environment in the `coach/venv` folder seems to be missing Django. If you plan to work locally, I recommend recreating it:
```bash
cd coach
rm -rf venv
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

<script>
    // Hero Title & Subtitle Rotation
    const taglines = [
        { 
            title: "Global Wealth, Powered by Crypto & Real Assets", 
            subtitle: "Invest in cryptocurrency, mining, P2P trading, and global digital assets with complete transparency" 
        },
        { 
            title: "Your Gateway to Smart Crypto Trading", 
            subtitle: "Diversified cryptocurrency portfolios with real-time trading and secure wallet management" 
        },
        { 
            title: "Trade, Mine, and Grow Your Crypto", 
            subtitle: "Access spot trading, cloud mining, P2P exchange, and multi-currency wallets in one platform" 
        },
        { 
            title: "Secure Cryptocurrency Platform", 
            subtitle: "Advanced security measures protecting your assets 24/7 with KYC verification and escrow services" 
        }
    ];

    let currentIndex = 0;
    const titleElement = document.getElementById('heroTitle');
    const subtitleElement = document.getElementById('heroSubtitle');

    function rotateHeroText() {
        currentIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % taglines.length;
        
        // Fade out
        titleElement.style.opacity = '0';
        titleElement.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        subtitleElement.style.opacity = '0';
        subtitleElement.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        
        setTimeout(() => {
            // Update content
            titleElement.textContent = taglines[currentIndex].title;
            subtitleElement.textContent = taglines[currentIndex].subtitle;
            
            // Fade in
            titleElement.style.opacity = '1';
            titleElement.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            subtitleElement.style.opacity = '1';
            subtitleElement.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
        }, 500);
    }

    // Start rotation every 6 seconds
    if (titleElement && subtitleElement) {
        setInterval(rotateHeroText, 6000);
    }
</script>

{% block content %}
<!-- Use Hero Overlay Style for consistency -->
<div class="hero-overlay" style="position: fixed; opacity: 0.5;"></div>

<div class="auth-wrapper">
    <div class="auth-card" data-aos="zoom-in">
        <div class="auth-logo">
            <h1 class="brand-text">Coach<span class="accent-text"> JV</span></h1>
            <p class="text-muted">3T Warrior Academy</p>
        </div>

        <div id="alert-container">
            {% if messages %}
                {% for message in messages %}
                    <div class="alert alert-{{ message.tags }} alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
                        {{ message }}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
                    </div>
                {% endfor %}
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <form id="loginForm">
            {% csrf_token %}
            <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Username</label>
                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="username" id="username" placeholder="Enter your username" required>
            </div>
            
            <div class="form-group">
                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                    <label class="form-label">Password</label>
                    <a href="/password-reset" class="small" style="color: var(--accent-blue); text-decoration: none;">Forgot?</a>
                </div>
                <input type="password" class="form-control" name="password" id="password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" class="hero-btn hero-btn-primary auth-btn" id="loginBtn">
                <span class="btn-text">Login to Platform</span>
                <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm d-none" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span>
            </button>
        </form>

        <div class="auth-links">
            Don't have an account? <a href="/register">Sign Up Now</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    document.getElementById('loginForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const loginBtn = document.getElementById('loginBtn');
        const btnText = loginBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = loginBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        // Show loading
        loginBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Authenticating...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');
        
        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());
        
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/login/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });
            
            const result = await response.json();
            
            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error || 'Login failed. Please check your credentials.'}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                    An error occurred. Please try again later.
                    <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                </div>
            `;
        } finally {
            loginBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Login to Platform';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}
