{% block content %}
<div class="hero-overlay" style="position: fixed; opacity: 0.5;"></div>

<div class="auth-wrapper">
    <div class="auth-card" data-aos="zoom-in">
        <div class="auth-logo">
            <h1 class="brand-text">Join<span class="accent-text"> JV</span></h1>
            <p class="text-muted">Start Your Warrior Journey Today</p>
        </div>

        <div id="alert-container"></div>

        <!-- Registration Form -->
        <div id="register-form-section">
            <form id="registerForm">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Full Name</label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control" name="full_name" id="full_name" placeholder="John Doe" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Username</label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control" name="username" id="username" placeholder="warrior123" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Email Address</label>
                    <input type="email" class="form-control" name="email" id="email" placeholder="john@example.com" required>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
                            <input type="password" class="form-control" name="password" id="password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label class="form-label">Confirm</label>
                            <input type="password" class="form-control" name="confirm_password" id="confirm_password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <button type="submit" class="hero-btn auth-btn text-white" id="registerBtn">
                    <span class="btn-text">Create Warrior Account</span>
                    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm d-none" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                </button>
            </form>
            <div class="auth-links">
                Already have an account? <a href="/login">Login Here</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Email Verification -->
        <div id="verification-section" class="verification-section">
            <div class="mb-4">
                <i class="fas fa-envelope-open-text mb-3" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--accent-purple);"></i>
                <h3 class="text-white">Verify Your Email</h3>
                <p class="text-muted">We've sent a 6-digit code to <span id="user-email" style="color: var(--accent-purple); font-weight: 600;"></span></p>
            </div>
            <form id="verifyForm">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="form-group">
                    <input type="text" class="form-control code-input" name="code" id="verification_code" maxlength="6" placeholder="000000" required>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="hero-btn hero-btn-primary auth-btn w-100" id="verifyBtn">
                    <span class="btn-text">Verify & Access Dashboard</span>
                </button>
            </form>
            <div class="mt-4">
                <button id="resendBtn" class="btn btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none">
                    <i class="fas fa-redo me-1"></i>Resend Code
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    let userEmail = '';

    document.getElementById('registerForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const registerBtn = document.getElementById('registerBtn');
        const btnText = registerBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = registerBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        registerBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Creating Account...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/register/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                userEmail = result.email;
                document.getElementById('user-email').textContent = userEmail;
                document.getElementById('register-form-section').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('verification-section').style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">An error occurred. Please try again.</div>`;
        } finally {
            registerBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Create Warrior Account';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('verifyForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const verifyBtn = document.getElementById('verifyBtn');
        const btnText = verifyBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        
        verifyBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Verifying...';

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const token = formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken');
        const code = document.getElementById('verification_code').value;

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/verify-email/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': token
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail, code: code})
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
                verifyBtn.disabled = false;
                btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Verification failed.</div>`;
            verifyBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('resendBtn').addEventListener('click', async function() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/resend-verification/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': document.querySelector('[name=csrfmiddlewaretoken]').value
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail})
            });
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">Verification code resent!</div>`;
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Failed to resend code.</div>`;
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-purple) 0%, var(--accent-cyan) 100%);
        border: none;
    }

    .auth-links {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: 2rem;
        color: var(--text-muted);
        font-size: 0.9rem;
    }

    .auth-links a {
        color: var(--accent-purple);
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 600;
    }

    .verification-section {
        display: none;
        text-align: center;
    }

    .code-input {
        font-size: 2rem;
        text-align: center;
        letter-spacing: 0.5rem;
        font-weight: 700;
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="hero-overlay" style="position: fixed; opacity: 0.5;"></div>

<div class="auth-wrapper">
    <div class="auth-card" data-aos="zoom-in">
        <div class="auth-logo">
            <h1 class="brand-text">Join<span class="accent-text"> JV</span></h1>
            <p class="text-muted">Start Your Warrior Journey Today</p>
        </div>

        <div id="alert-container"></div>

        <!-- Registration Form -->
        <div id="register-form-section">
            <form id="registerForm">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Full Name</label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control" name="full_name" id="full_name" placeholder="John Doe" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Username</label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control" name="username" id="username" placeholder="warrior123" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label">Email Address</label>
                    <input type="email" class="form-control" name="email" id="email" placeholder="john@example.com" required>
                </div>
                <div class="row">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
                            <input type="password" class="form-control" name="password" id="password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label class="form-label">Confirm</label>
                            <input type="password" class="form-control" name="confirm_password" id="confirm_password" placeholder="••••••••" required>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <button type="submit" class="hero-btn auth-btn text-white" id="registerBtn">
                    <span class="btn-text">Create Warrior Account</span>
                    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm d-none" role="status" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                </button>
            </form>
            <div class="auth-links">
                Already have an account? <a href="/login">Login Here</a>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Email Verification -->
        <div id="verification-section" class="verification-section">
            <div class="mb-4">
                <i class="fas fa-envelope-open-text mb-3" style="font-size: 3rem; color: var(--accent-purple);"></i>
                <h3 class="text-white">Verify Your Email</h3>
                <p class="text-muted">We've sent a 6-digit code to <span id="user-email" style="color: var(--accent-purple); font-weight: 600;"></span></p>
            </div>
            <form id="verifyForm">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="form-group">
                    <input type="text" class="form-control code-input" name="code" id="verification_code" maxlength="6" placeholder="000000" required>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="hero-btn hero-btn-primary auth-btn w-100" id="verifyBtn">
                    <span class="btn-text">Verify & Access Dashboard</span>
                </button>
            </form>
            <div class="mt-4">
                <button id="resendBtn" class="btn btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none">
                    <i class="fas fa-redo me-1"></i>Resend Code
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block extra_js %}
<script>
    let userEmail = '';

    document.getElementById('registerForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const registerBtn = document.getElementById('registerBtn');
        const btnText = registerBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        const spinner = registerBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
        
        registerBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Creating Account...';
        spinner.classList.remove('d-none');

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/register/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': data.csrfmiddlewaretoken
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(data)
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                userEmail = result.email;
                document.getElementById('user-email').textContent = userEmail;
                document.getElementById('register-form-section').style.display = 'none';
                document.getElementById('verification-section').style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">An error occurred. Please try again.</div>`;
        } finally {
            registerBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Create Warrior Account';
            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('verifyForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const verifyBtn = document.getElementById('verifyBtn');
        const btnText = verifyBtn.querySelector('.btn-text');
        
        verifyBtn.disabled = true;
        btnText.textContent = 'Verifying...';

        const formData = new FormData(this);
        const token = formData.get('csrfmiddlewaretoken');
        const code = document.getElementById('verification_code').value;

        try {
            const response = await fetch('/verify-email/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': token
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail, code: code})
            });
            const result = await response.json();

            if (result.success) {
                window.location.href = result.redirect;
            } else {
                document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show">
                        ${result.error}
                        <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert"></button>
                    </div>
                `;
                verifyBtn.disabled = false;
                btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
            }
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Verification failed.</div>`;
            verifyBtn.disabled = false;
            btnText.textContent = 'Verify & Access Dashboard';
        }
    });

    document.getElementById('resendBtn').addEventListener('click', async function() {
        try {
            const response = await fetch('/resend-verification/', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'X-CSRFToken': document.querySelector('[name=csrfmiddlewaretoken]').value
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({email: userEmail})
            });
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-success">Verification code resent!</div>`;
        } catch (error) {
            document.getElementById('alert-container').innerHTML = `<div class="alert alert-danger">Failed to resend code.</div>`;
        }
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

        ads = P2PTrade.objects.filter(status='active')

        ads = []
        
    context = {
        'ads': ads,
    }
    return render(request, 'dashboard/p2p.html', context)

def profile_view(request):
    """User profile"""
    context = {

    --text-secondary: #94a3b8;
    --text-muted: #64748b;

    --danger-color: #ef4444;
    --warning-color: #f59e0b;
    --info-color: #3b82f6;
    
    /* Gradients */
    --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #0A1F44 0%, #1e1b4b 50%, #4338ca 100%);
    --gradient-gold: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700 0%, #FFA500 100%);
    --gradient-blue: linear-gradient(135deg, #3B82F6 0%, #06B6D4 100%);
}

* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--gradient-primary);
    background-attachment: fixed;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    min-height: 100vh;
}

/* Dashboard Wrapper */
.dashboard-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding-top: 40px; /* Space for crypto ticker */
}

/* Sidebar */
.dashboard-sidebar {
    width: 280px;
    background: var(--card-bg);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-right: 1px solid var(--card-border);
    padding: 2rem 0;
    position: fixed;
    left: 0;
    top: 40px;
    bottom: 0;
    overflow-y: auto;
    z-index: 100;
}

.sidebar-header {
    padding: 0 2rem 2rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--card-border);
}

.logo-section {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent-gold);
}

.logo-section i {
    font-size: 2rem;
    background: var(--gradient-gold);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}

.sidebar-nav {
    padding: 2rem 0;
    flex: 1;
}

## About Coach JV (John Vasquez)

### Background
- **Real Name:** John Vasquez

- **Followers:** 2M+ combined across TikTok, YouTube, Instagram

### Personal Story
- Survived attempted suicide in 2006

- Focus: Mindset, health, and wealth transformation

### 3T Warrior Academy Programs

#### Core Training
1. **5P Framework:** Cash Flow, Appreciation, Protection, Leverage, De-Risking
2. **Financial Freedom & Crypto Training**

4. **Mindset Development**
   - Limiting beliefs work
   - Discipline building

5. **Tech Focus**
   - Web3 & blockchain education
   - Fintech navigation
   - "Family bank" strategies
   - Business case studies

### XRP Position & Philosophy

#### Investment Stance
- **Bullish on XRP:** Calls it "this generation's biggest missed opportunity"
- Advocates 10+ year holding periods
- Core holdings: XRP, Bitcoin, Solana
- Emphasizes patience and conviction
- Criticizes short-term trading

#### Key Beliefs

- Institutional adoption accelerating
- Regulatory clarity improving (post-SEC lawsuit)
- Real-world payment utility
- Will reshape financial infrastructure by 2030

#### Advice to Investors
- Avoid emotional trading
- Focus on fundamentals
- Hold through volatility
- Legal asset protection (LLC structures)
- Stop chasing quick profits

- 100K+ Warriors Trained
- Multiple successful businesses spawned

    init() {
        this.createPopupElement();
        setTimeout(() => this.showRandomTestimonial(), 8000);
        // Store the interval ID for cleanup
        this.popupInterval = setInterval(() => this.showRandomTestimonial(), 25000);
    }

    destroy() {
        if (this.popupInterval) {
            clearInterval(this.popupInterval);
            this.popupInterval = null;
        }
        if (this.popupElement) {
            this.popupElement.remove();
        }
    }

    createPopupElement() {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.id = 'testimonial-popup-new';
        div.style.cssText = `
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 80px;
            left: 20px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 12px;
            max-width: 320px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            z-index: 9997;
            display: none;
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.2);
            transform: translateX(-120%);
            transition: transform 0.4s ease;
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(div);
        this.popupElement = div;
    }

    showRandomTestimonial() {
        if (this.shownIndices.length >= this.testimonials.length) {
            this.shownIndices = [];
        }

        let available = this.testimonials.map((_, i) => i).filter(i => !this.shownIndices.includes(i));
        const randomIndex = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];
        const person = this.testimonials[randomIndex];
        
        this.shownIndices.push(randomIndex);
        
        console.log(`Debug: Testimonial for ${person.name}, Avatar URL: ${person.avatar}`);
        
        this.popupElement.innerHTML = `
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;">
                <img src="${person.avatar}" 
                     style="width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #FFD700; flex-shrink: 0; background: #333;"
                     onerror="console.log('Error loading avatar for ${person.name}: ${person.avatar}'); this.onerror=null; this.src='https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=${encodeURIComponent(person.name)}&background=FFD700&color=000&size=42'">
                <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                        <span style="font-weight: 600; color: #fff; font-size: 0.9rem;">${person.name}</span>
                        <button onclick="document.getElementById('testimonial-popup-new').style.transform='translateX(-120%)';setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('testimonial-popup-new').style.display='none',400)" 
                                style="background: transparent; border: none; color: #999; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.2rem; padding: 0; line-height: 1;">×</button>
                    </div>
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #FFD700; margin-bottom: 6px;">${person.flag} ${person.country}</div>
                    <div style="color: #ccc; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.4; margin-bottom: 6px;">"${person.review}"</div>

                        <span style="color: #00A86B;">💰 Earned: ${person.amount}</span>
                        <span style="color: #888;">Invested: ${person.invested}</span>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;

        this.popupElement.style.display = 'block';
        setTimeout(() => {
            this.popupElement.style.transform = 'translateX(0)';
        }, 100);

        setTimeout(() => {
            this.popupElement.style.transform = 'translateX(-120%)';
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.popupElement.style.display = 'none';
            }, 400);
        }, 12000);
    }
}

OPTION 1: RENDER.COM (⭐ Recommended - Easiest & Fastest)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Why Render?
• render.yaml already configured in your repo
• Free SSL certificate
• Auto-deploy on git push
• Free PostgreSQL database
• 5-minute setup

Steps:
1. Go to: https://dashboard.render.com
2. Sign up/Login with GitHub
3. Click "New +" → "Web Service"
4. Select repo: KINGSACCOUNT1/coach-jv
5. Render auto-detects everything ✨
6. Add environment variables:
   - SECRET_KEY (generate one)
   - ZOHO_EMAIL=support@coachjvtech.us
   - ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD=<your-password>
7. Click "Create Web Service"
8. Wait 5-10 minutes ☕
9. Get your URL: coach-jv-xyz.onrender.com

Then update Cloudflare:
• Go to Cloudflare DNS
• Change @ record to: CNAME → coach-jv-xyz.onrender.com
• Change www record to: CNAME → coach-jv-xyz.onrender.com
• Set proxy: ON (orange cloud) ☁️

Done! 🎉

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

OPTION 2: DIGITALOCEAN (Professional, $5-12/month)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Steps:
1. Go to: https://cloud.digitalocean.com/apps
2. Create App → Connect GitHub
3. Select: KINGSACCOUNT1/coach-jv
4. Configure:
   Build: pip install -r requirements.txt && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput
   Run: gunicorn coach.wsgi:application
5. Add PostgreSQL database
6. Set environment variables
7. Deploy
8. Point Cloudflare DNS to DigitalOcean URL

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

OPTION 3: EXISTING VPS (You have server)
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Point Cloudflare A records to your VPS IP:
• @ → A → Your.VPS.IP.Address
• www → A → Your.VPS.IP.Address

Then deploy Django on your server.

class Profile(models.Model):

    CRYPTO_CHOICES = [

    class Meta:
        verbose_name_plural = 'Ticket Replies'
        ordering = ['created_at']

    def __str__(self):
        return f"Reply to #{self.ticket.id}"

content:
I have analyzed the current `my-bank` repository and compared its structure with your other projects. Here is the situation:

### **1. Status of `my-bank`**
The `my-bank` folder you requested me to work on is a **frontend-only prototype**.
*   **No Backend/Storage**: It uses `localStorage` in the browser, which is not "real storage" and will be cleared if the user closes their browser or clears their cache.
*   **No Email/OTP Logic**: The code contains no functions or services to handle email sending, OTP generation, or verification. The UI elements related to these are just labels and text for visual design purposes.
*   **Fraud Prevention**: The "Fraud Prevention" message you see on the site is a static, hardcoded marketing string, not a functional security feature.

### **2. Regarding Neon DB & Zoho Mail**
I have scanned your local environment, including your history. It appears that the **Neon DB** and **Zoho Mail** configurations are associated with the `coachjvtech` project (located in the `coach/` folder), not `my-bank`. I confirmed this by checking the `render.yaml` inside `coach/`, which contains your actual database URL and email setup details.

### **How to proceed**
To make `my-bank` a functional application using your existing resources, we need to transform it from a prototype into a full-stack application:

1.  **Architecture**: We need to connect this frontend to a backend (or use a BaaS like Supabase) and your database.
2.  **Implementation**:
    *   **Setup Database**: Connect to your Neon DB.
    *   **Setup Authentication/Email**: Implement a backend authentication API that uses Zoho Mail for verification codes.
    *   **Remove Demo Code**: Delete the hardcoded `DEMO_USERS` and `localStorage` mock logic.

**Please confirm if you want me to:**
*   **A)** Start by creating an implementation plan to integrate `my-bank` with your **Neon DB** and **Zoho Mail** (moving it to a full-stack architecture).
*   **B)** Keep it as a frontend prototype and just fix the "look" of the broken OTP/email UI components.

*Note: If you want to use the existing `coach/` setup, we may need to migrate or share configurations, as those are already set up for your domain.*

content:
I apologize for referencing the wrong file. I am now strictly analyzing the `my-bank/` directory as requested.

I have performed an exhaustive search within `my-bank/` and, as my previous analysis indicated, **there is zero functional code** for email verification, OTP generation, or fraud prevention logic in this folder.

To "correct the errors" and "add real storage" as you asked, we have to build these systems from scratch because they simply do not exist in the current codebase.

### Findings from `my-bank/` (Source of Truth):

1.  **Storage**: The `AuthContext.tsx` file confirms the app only uses `localStorage` (browser-side mock storage). There is no code here that connects to any database (Neon or otherwise).
2.  **Email/OTP**: There is no code here that connects to Zoho Mail or any email service. The "verification" references you see in the UI (like in `settings/page.tsx`) are purely **visual labels** meant to simulate a UI, not functional code.
3.  **Fraud Prevention**: The "Fraud Prevention" messaging you see is purely **static text** hardcoded in the frontend components, with no underlying security logic or monitoring implemented.

### How to Fix This (The Plan)

Since you have Neon DB and Zoho Mail already, we need to **bridge the gap** between this `my-bank` frontend and your existing backend services.

**To fix this, we need to:**
1.  **Create a Backend/API**: Since `my-bank` is a Next.js app, we should use **Next.js API Routes** (found in `src/app/api/`) as a backend to securely talk to your **Neon DB** and **Zoho Mail**.
2.  **Replace Mock Auth**: Replace the `DEMO_USERS` and `localStorage` logic in `AuthContext.tsx` with calls to these new API routes.
3.  **Implement Security**: Add real fraud prevention (e.g., rate limiting on the API routes) and real OTP generation/verification logic using your Zoho credentials.

**Would you like me to create an implementation plan to start building these API routes and connecting your database to `my-bank`?**

content:
It appears there was a fundamental misunderstanding regarding the contents of `my-bank`. I have updated the `my-bank/` folder by pulling the latest `master` branch from the GitHub repository `https://github.com/KINGSACCOUNT1/MY-BANK_WORK`.

### Important Findings
The repository I just pulled into `my-bank/` is **not a Next.js (frontend) application**. It is actually a **Django (Python) application**, similar in structure to your `coach/` project.

Because the repository structure has changed completely from a frontend-only prototype to a full Django backend structure, I need to know how you want to proceed:

1.  **Re-Verify Goal**: Is `my-bank/` now supposed to be a Django project that uses the Neon DB and Zoho Mail credentials, or was this a mistake and you intended to pull a different repository?
2.  **Next Steps**: Since this is now a Python/Django structure, I can properly assist with implementing the OTP, email verification, and "real storage" features using Django's ORM and your existing configurations.

Please let me know if I should proceed with analyzing this new Django codebase or if you need to revert to a different version of this repository.

content:
The issues you are experiencing are common in Django deployments to services like Render, especially when dealing with custom domains, SSL, and external mail providers.

Here is the diagnosis based on the code in `my-bank/`:

### 1. The "Fraud Prevention" Red Page
This is **not a feature**, but likely an **incorrect security configuration** triggering a 403 Forbidden error.
*   **Cause**: In `offshorebank/settings.py`, you have strict security settings enabled when `DEBUG=False` (which is standard for Render). Specifically, `CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE = True` and `SECURE_HSTS_PRELOAD = True` require HTTPS. If your browser or the Render edge routing is detecting a protocol mismatch or if your `CSRF_TRUSTED_ORIGINS` does not exactly match how you are accessing the site, Django blocks the request with a 403.
*   **Fix**:
    1.  Ensure you are accessing the site **only via HTTPS**.
    2.  Check the server logs during the "red page" event to confirm if it is a **CSRF verification failure** or a **DisallowedHost** error.

### 2. Email Verification & OTP Not Working
While you added the environment variables, Django's email sending can fail silently if the SMTP configuration is wrong.
*   **Cause**:
    *   **Invalid Credentials**: Zoho requires an **App-Specific Password**, not your main account password.
    *   **SMTP Port**: Ensure it is set to `587`.
    *   **Missing Variables**: If `EMAIL_HOST_USER` or `EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD` are not correctly loaded by `django-dotenv` (or directly in Render's dashboard), it defaults to empty strings, causing sending to fail.
*   **Verification**: Add this temporary test code to a view or a management command to see the *real* error:
    ```python
    from django.core.mail import send_mail
    try:
        send_mail('Test Subject', 'Test Message', 'support@offshorebank.us', ['your-personal-email@example.com'], fail_silently=False)
        print("Success!")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error: {e}")
    ```

### Recommended Immediate Steps

1.  **Check Logs**: Please run `render logs` (or check them in the Render dashboard) for your web service to see the **exact error message** when the "red page" appears.
2.  **Verify SMTP**: Use the test code snippet above to confirm Zoho SMTP is working.
3.  **Environment Variables**: Double-check in the Render "Environment" tab for your service that `EMAIL_HOST_USER`, `EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD`, and `DATABASE_URL` are set **exactly** as required, without extra spaces.

Please share the specific error message from the logs when you trigger the red page, and I can tell you exactly which setting to change.

content:
The logs you provided only show that your server is healthy (`GET /health/` 200). They do not show the actual request where the user encounters the "fraud prevention" red page or the email error.

To debug this, I need to see the application's **error logs** when that event actually happens.

### **How to get the necessary logs:**

Please perform the following steps to capture the actual error:

1.  **Open the Red Page**: Open your banking website in your browser and perform the action that causes the red "fraud prevention" page (or the email failure) to appear.
2.  **Get the Logs Immediately**: Immediately after seeing the red page, run this command in your terminal within the `my-bank` directory (or check your Render dashboard's **"Logs"** tab):
    ```bash
    # If using Render CLI
    render logs -s <your-service-name> --tail
    # Or in the Render dashboard, ensure you are looking at the "Application Logs"
    # not just the system/health-check logs.
    ```
3.  **Look for Errors**: Look for lines that contain `ERROR`, `CRITICAL`, `Exception`, or `403`.

### **What I suspect is happening:**

1.  **Fraud Page (403 Forbidden)**: This is usually triggered by Django's `CsrfViewMiddleware` or `SecurityMiddleware`. When you get that red page, the logs will show a line like `Forbidden (CSRF token missing or incorrect...)` or `DisallowedHost`.
2.  **Email Failure**: When you try to register, check the logs for an `ERROR` line referencing `banking.email_utils` or `smtplib`. It will likely say `ConnectionRefused`, `AuthenticationFailed`, or `Timeout`.

**Please capture the logs *exactly* at the moment you hit the error and paste them here.** That will show us exactly which security setting is blocking the user or why Zoho is rejecting the email connection.

content:
Based on the comprehensive audit of your `my-bank/` Django repository, here are the findings and the solutions to stop the "fraud prevention" warnings and fix the email system.

### 1. Root Cause of "Fraud Prevention" Red Page
The red page you are seeing is **not a Django error code** (like a 403 or 404).

Based on the file `DANGEROUS_SITE_FIX.md` found in your own repo, your website is likely being flagged by **Browser Phishing Detection systems** (like Google Safe Browsing or others) because:
*   **Domain/Keywords**: Terms like "offshore", "bank", and "banking" are heavily monitored.
*   **Hosting**: Free hosting platforms are frequently blacklisted because scammers misuse them.
*   **Security Configuration**: Your `settings.py` has high-security headers enabled (`SECURE_HSTS_PRELOAD`, `CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE`). If these are set but the site is not fully correctly configured with a valid SSL/TLS certificate via a trusted provider, browsers will show security warnings.

**How to fix it:**
*   **Stop triggering filters**: You may need to change the domain name or at least add a more robust, professional privacy policy and contact page.
*   **Delisting**: You must request a review for your domain (`offshorebank.us`) on [Google Search Console](https://search.google.com/search-console/) to tell Google it is a legitimate site.
*   **Production SSL**: Ensure your Render configuration is properly utilizing SSL/TLS via a custom domain setup, rather than relying solely on the `onrender.com` domain.

### 2. Email Configuration Audit (Duplicates and Errors)
I found multiple, conflicting files containing email configuration advice (`DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE.md`, `EMAIL_SETUP_README.md`, `IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md`, etc.). This is likely why it feels "broken"—your setup might be reading documentation that is outdated or incorrect.

**The Fix:**
You must delete or ignore the other documentation files and ensure your configuration in `offshorebank/settings.py` and the Render **Environment Variables** are identical.

#### Step A: Consolidate Configuration
Ensure `offshorebank/settings.py` is the **only** source of truth for email logic. Your current code correctly uses `os.environ.get()`, which is good.

#### Step B: Verify Render Environment Variables
Go to your **Render Dashboard** -> **Web Service** -> **Environment** tab. Ensure *exactly* these keys exist and are correct:

| Key | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| `EMAIL_BACKEND` | `django.core.mail.backends.smtp.EmailBackend` |
| `EMAIL_HOST` | `smtp.zoho.com` |
| `EMAIL_PORT` | `587` |
| `EMAIL_USE_TLS` | `True` |
| `EMAIL_HOST_USER` | `support@offshorebank.us` |
| `EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD` | *(Your 16-character Zoho App-Specific Password)* |

**Important:** Do **not** use your main Zoho account password. Go to [Zoho Security](https://accounts.zoho.com/home#security/app_passwds) to generate a new **App-Specific Password** if it is not working.

### Recommended Path Forward
1.  **Check for Error Logs**: The next time you trigger an email (e.g., register a test account), immediately check your **Render Logs** for `smtplib` errors. If you see `AuthenticationFailed`, your Zoho App Password is wrong. If you see `ConnectionTimeout`, your port/SSL settings are wrong.
2.  **Clear Documentation**: Delete the files I listed as containing conflicting email guidance to prevent future confusion:
    *   `AUTHENTICATION_SYSTEM_SUMMARY.md`
    *   `IMPLEMENTATION_SUMMARY.md`
    *   `EMAIL_SETUP_README.md`
    *   `EMAIL_CONFIG_GUIDE.md`
3.  **Delist**: Visit Google Search Console to resolve the "fraud/phishing" warning.

If you can provide the **exact error log** (look for `ERROR`) from Render when you try to send an email, I can confirm the exact fix for the email system.

args.content:
# Email Setup Guide (Zoho Mail)

To set up email for your Django application, ensure the following environment variables are set **exactly** as described in your Render Web Service dashboard under the "Environment" tab.

### Render Environment Variables

| Key | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| `EMAIL_BACKEND` | `django.core.mail.backends.smtp.EmailBackend` |
| `EMAIL_HOST` | `smtp.zoho.com` |
| `EMAIL_PORT` | `587` |
| `EMAIL_USE_TLS` | `True` |
| `EMAIL_HOST_USER` | `support@offshorebank.us` |
| `EMAIL_HOST_PASSWORD` | *(Your 16-character Zoho App-Specific Password)* |

### Critical Steps
1. **Zoho App Password**: Ensure you are using an **App-Specific Password** generated here: [Zoho Security](https://accounts.zoho.com/home#security/app_passwds). Do **not** use your primary email password.
2. **Apply Changes**: After updating environment variables in Render, you **must** click "Save Changes" and wait for the service to redeploy.
3. **Verify**: Once redeployed, trigger a registration or password reset to test.

I have simplified your email configuration by deleting the conflicting documentation files and creating a single, clean guide in `my-bank/EMAIL_SETUP.md`.

Your configuration is now unified. Please follow these steps to finish the fix:

1.  **Update Render**: Go to the **Render Dashboard** -> your Web Service -> **Environment** tab.

Once the deployment finishes, please try to register a new user to test the email verification. If it still fails, check your **Render Logs** for the exact `ERROR` line and share it with me.
